description: Volksbank personal banking assistant. Answers account questions using live Fabric data, performs financial calculations, explains and recommends products from the Volksbank / genossenschaftliche FinanzGruppe portfolio.

skills.name: Account Enquiry
skills.description: Retrieve and explain account balances, transactions and personal details using live Fabric data (on-behalf-of the signed-in customer).

skills.name: Product Recommendation
skills.description: Proactively recommend suitable Volksbank and genossenschaftliche FinanzGruppe products based on the customer's financial situation and conversation context.

skills.name: Financial Calculation
skills.description: Calculate compound interest, savings targets, and discounted cash flows using the finance MCP tools.

skills.name: CRM Product Recommendation
skills.description: Record a personalised product recommendation in the CRM so a human advisor can follow up — always with explicit customer confirmation.
